title: rohdea nutans
intro: Rohdea nutans, also known as the Lilyturf or Sacred Lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant in the Asparagaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Rohdea nutans include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tonics that are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
